name: T V School Bus Svc
recent_news: No web presence found; PO Box-only address (PO Box 1497, Houston) and no website/phone suggests a very small, possibly dormant or sole-proprietor operator
fit_notes: Too small / unverifiable for diligence; PO-Box-only listing with 47 employees suggests data-quality issue. Deprioritize unless ground-truth confirms an operating fleet.

name: Delphis Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Address 55 Fagan Dr, Hillsborough CA is a luxury residential property (listed on Compass/MLS as a single-family home, originally built as a carriage house on the historic Fagan Estate), not a bus yard. Company name format 'Inc Which Will Do Business As' is a CA Secretary-of-State fictitious-name artifact; no operating school-bus presence found.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in target. Address is a private residence and the company name appears to be a shell/holding entity, not an operating school-bus contractor. Exclude.

name: Execuspace-AA Avenue Bus Ctr
recent_news: 3340 Dundee Rd / 1 Northfield Plaza area is the Execuspace Office Center, a shared/coworking office (turnkey office and meeting room rentals) — not a bus yard. No operating school-bus carrier named 'AA Avenue Bus Center' found in Northbrook IL. Northbrook districts (28 and 30) are served primarily by First Student.
fit_notes: Not a viable target. Address is a shared executive-suite/coworking facility; likely a mail-drop registration rather than an operating contractor. Exclude.

name: East End Bus
owner_or_parent: John B. Mensch family of companies (Montauk Transit Service LLC / East End Bus Lines)
districts_or_customers: NJ districts via Montauk Transit at 945 Somerset St (Franklin Twp area); affiliated LI/NY school routes via East End Bus Lines (Medford NY)
recent_news: 945 Somerset St, Somerset NJ is also Montauk Transit Service LLC, founded by John Mensch — same operator family. East End Bus Lines (Medford NY) filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy in 2018 (Case 8:18-bk-76176). In Oct 2024, John Mensch pleaded guilty in EDNY to a ~$9.6M bank-fraud/check-kiting conspiracy (2017–2018) tied to East End Bus Lines, facing up to 5 years. Montauk Transit operates as the successor NJ entity.
fit_notes: Avoid. Significant reputational/legal overhang: founder pleaded guilty to multi-million-dollar bank-fraud conspiracy (Oct 2024); related entity went through Chapter 11. Even if operational pieces remain, regulatory/contract risk with school districts is very high. Decline unless a clean carve-out via the bankruptcy estate is on offer.

name: Leade RS Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Address 548 Market St Pmb 90321, San Francisco is a well-known commercial PMB (private mail box / Earth Class Mail / Stable) used by thousands of registered entities — not an operating bus yard. Company name format 'Inc Which Will Do Business As' is a CA Secretary-of-State fictitious-name registration artifact. 'Leade.rs' brand on Facebook appears to be a leadership/community platform, unrelated to school transport. No SF Bay Area school-bus operator under this name confirmed.
fit_notes: Not a viable target. PMB address and 'Which Will Do Business As' suffix indicate a shell/holding entity, not an operating school-bus contractor. Exclude.
